overall.description: Bus simulator gameplay footage from the driver's perspective during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates wet urban streets with active windshield wipers, stopping at traffic lights and following other vehicles through a European-style city.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with tram tracks and residential buildings

events.description: bus approaches red traffic light and comes to a complete stop behind a taxi

agents.ego_description: operating the bus on wet roads, slowing to stop at the red traffic light while windshield wipers maintain visibility

notable_agents.action: taxi driving ahead and braking to stop at the red light

entered.detail: interior control panel with steering wheel, gauges, and illuminated buttons
digital navigation display showing route map and stop information
overhead screen displaying live feed of bus interior and passengers
dual wipers actively sweeping heavy rain from the windshield
multi-story residential buildings with balconies lining the street
multi-story residential buildings with large windows
mature leafy trees along the sidewalk providing partial canopy
green trees planted along the curb
overhead traffic signal showing red light
light-colored taxi with roof sign stopped at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the driver's seat of a bus during a heavy downpour, with wipers clearing the windshield. The bus travels along a tree-lined urban street with apartment buildings on both sides, gradually slowing as it approaches a red traffic light where a taxi waits ahead.

events.description: camera pans right to check bus door and side mirror while stopped at intersection
traffic light changes to green and bus begins accelerating through the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light, checking right side mirror and door area, then accelerating through the intersection

entered.detail: interior view of the bus entry door with glass panels and yellow handrails
exterior side mirror reflecting the street and parked cars
ground-floor shops with signage and large display windows

segments.scene_description: The bus remains stopped at the red light as the driver checks the right side door and mirror. The traffic light turns green, and the bus accelerates forward through the intersection, passing commercial buildings on the right while following the taxi ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with shops and tram infrastructure

events.description: passing through wide intersection with tram tracks and crosswalks

agents.ego_description: navigating the bus along wet city streets, maintaining steady speed through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan parked along the curb

entered.detail: retail storefronts with awnings and signage at street level
line of vehicles parked along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a commercial street lined with shops and parked cars. The windshield wipers continue clearing heavy rain as the vehicle passes through a wide intersection with tram tracks, maintaining a steady pace behind the taxi in moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with bus stop and traffic signals

events.description: bus approaches and stops behind taxi at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: following the taxi through wet streets, gradually slowing and stopping at the next red traffic light

notable_agents.action: taxi stopped at red light directly ahead of the bus

entered.detail: covered passenger waiting area with glass panels and bench
bright red compact car parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The bus continues through the rainy urban environment, approaching a bus stop shelter on the right. The taxi ahead slows to a stop at a red traffic light, and the bus decelerates to stop behind it, with the red light visible in the distance and parked cars lining the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-soaked urban corridor between two traffic stops. It begins during a heavy downpour on a tree-lined street of apartment buildings, with wipers clearing the windshield as the bus slows to a halt behind a taxi at a red light. As the light turns green, the camera perspective shifts slightly to check the side mirror before the bus accelerates through the intersection and passes a row of commercial buildings. The scene then expands into a wider commercial district with shops and tram tracks, maintaining a steady pace through moderate traffic under the persistent rain. Finally, the bus approaches a roadside shelter and decelerates to a stop behind the taxi once more as another red light appears in the distance.
